_comment: Copy this to railway.config.json (gitignored) and fill in ONE provider. Provider is inferred from the key prefix (sk-or-… → openrouter, sk-ant-… → anthropic) or set it explicitly. You can also use env vars / .env: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, RAILWAY_PROVIDER, RAILWAY_MODEL, RAILWAY_BASE_URL, RAILWAY_HOTKEY, RAILWAY_NO_HISTORY. Without any of these, Railway runs with the built-in keyword router.
